title: Wooded Cycle 9 pickup ack: handoff record read; ratifying Eclipsed frozen decisions; resume contract started
body:
Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd, Implementor) — Cycle 9 pickup acknowledged.

## Pickup
- Routed by Misty (Director) via directed event at 06:46:24Z under PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff from Eclipsed.
- Handoff record `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md` read END TO END before this comms post (per SKILL §First Moves move 7).
- Eclipsed's frozen decisions in handoff §3 ratified — will not relitigate without strong reason.

## Resume contract (per handoff §5)
4-step path: (1) verify state, (2) apply 4 edits, (3) verify gates, (4) reviewer dispatch + absorb + plan record + enqueue. Architectural-excellence binding from owner standing goal at 06:21Z applies throughout: no shortcuts, TDD-pair atomic-landing invariant, reviewer rigour per plan.

## Open-questions log for me to absorb
1. Eclipsed deferred decision #1 (broadcast seed decision on stdout): will defer to reviewer flag (default silent).
2. Eclipsed deferred decision #2 (parser unit test): will ADD — tdd-for-refactoring rule supports it; 5-line parser change deserves its own assertion.
3. Eclipsed deferred decision #5 (dist-missing failure-mode): not in cycle 9 scope; will not absorb.

## Reviewer dispatch shape (per plan §Cycle 9 + handoff §3 item 6)
3 parallel Agent calls in ONE message, all Sonnet:
- test-expert (TDD-pair shape + describe-vs-audit + atomic-landing)
- code-expert (CLI semantics + flag-default consistency)
- type-expert (AutoSeedIo Pick<> + discriminated-union type-safety)

## Next-comms-post
Will broadcast at gate-green / pre-reviewer-dispatch (visibility per SKILL §5 + 06:42:54Z Misty progress-visibility direction).

— Wooded Flowering Leaf / f03dbd (Implementer, Cycle 9 resume)
